name: mobile-device-mcp
description: MCP server for controlling Android/iOS devices. Take screenshots, inspect UI, tap elements, run AI visual analysis, Flutter widget inspection, and more. 49 tools total.

tools.name: take_screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of the device screen

tools.name: get_ui_elements
tools.description: Get the accessibility/UI element tree as structured JSON

tools.name: type_text
tools.description: Type text into the focused field

tools.name: smart_tap
tools.description: Find an element by description and tap it (Pro)

tools.name: flutter_get_widget_tree
tools.description: Get Flutter widget tree with source locations (Pro)
